body.title: Remove all remaining lab.utility_closet imports
body.result: Registry migrated to UU (agent_base.py + registry.py self-contained); 116 files updated from lab.utility_closet.registry → devices.igor.tools.registry; namespace package bridge for remaining budget/machine_manager/filesystem. Collection errors: 57→13 (all 13 unrelated). Commit 4076a0ad
body.description:
171 remaining references to lab.utility_closet across 120 files. Standing instruction: 'there is no utility closet anywhere anymore — anytime you find a mention of it, that's a ticket for removal.'

**Starting instruction:** Grep the entire codebase for the word 'closet'. Work through every hit. The ticket is done when a detailed grep finds zero occurrences anywhere in the codebase.

Top offenders:
- wild_igor/igor/main.py (9 references)
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/push_sources.py (7)
- wild_igor/igor/tools/routing_tools.py (5)
- lab/claudecode/utility_closet_server.py (5) — the server itself uses comms/transports from UC
- Plus ~115 other files with 1-4 references each

The bulk of references are:
- lab.utility_closet.registry → already re-exported from wild_igor.igor.tools.registry (T-remove-utility-closet-registry done); remaining files should switch to the canonical import
- lab.utility_closet.agent_base.get_logger → should use wild_igor.igor.igor_base.get_logger or loguru directly
- lab.utility_closet.comms / transports — these are still the live comms system; migration requires moving comms into ADC

Approach: work file-by-file, smallest to largest. Registry changes are mechanical. agent_base.get_logger replacements are mechanical. The comms/transports/server migration is a separate phase.

**Affected files:** ~120 files in wild_igor/igor/ and lab/ directories
**Design rules:** No new utility_closet imports. All new code uses canonical import paths.
**Scope boundary:** In scope: remove all uses of the word 'closet' from the codebase — imports, strings, comments, variable names, log messages. Out of scope: moving comms infrastructure (that's a phase-specific migration).
**Test plan:** `grep -rn -i 'closet' ~/TheIgors/wild_igor/ ~/dev/src/UnseenUniversity/ --include='*.py' --include='*.json' --include='*.yaml' --include='*.md'` returns zero results. That is the pass condition.
